>     The Velocity of Quality: Because the menu is so small, the ingredients never sit under a heat lamp. The line is constantly moving. The chicken you get was likely dropped into the fryer three minutes before you ordered it. "We do one industrial process, and we do it perfectly." They deliver exactly what is promised, every single time, which generates massive consumer trust.
>
> Coltbert thinks you can only have quality if you have a "Special Talent" (Cutie Mark) and a massive ego. He thinks factories are inherently soulless. Kemerskai proves Coltbert wrong. You can have an industrial factory that produces excellent food, but only if you treat the workers like citizens. Logistics and Solidarity can be just as romantic, and just as culturally profound, as Passion and Art.
>
> Today, the artisan master chef and the specialized honest factory are the high standards. Poseur fast food and legacy diners are dying out.
> **Note 6:** The Tragedy of Herzland (Pre-Revolution England):
> In their race to conquer the world and build the first massive factories (Grover IV's "Gilded Age"), the Herzland elites enclosed the farms, forced the peasants into the smoggy cities, and replaced their deeply skilled "Mother Processes" with mass-produced slop. They sacrificed their soul for steel.
>
> The Cloudbury Redemption (The Republic):
> When the Republicans (who are Herzlanders) flee north to Cloudbury in 981 to establish the Griffonian Republic, they don't just want to build a better government; they want to reclaim their stolen heritage. Because they are not "Snobs" like the Aquileians, they don't revive Haute Cuisine. They revive the Lost Working-Class Masterpieces of the English tradition, but they execute them using the "In-N-Out" model of cooperative, high-quality industrialization.

### British Allegories
* **Category:** Concept
> **Note 0:** Equestria, the Anglosphere equivalent in EaW, is The Stagnation of Harmony aka post 1991 West. Therefore, British allegories are split across a bunch of different EaW factions.
> **Note 1:** Herzland = British early industrialization
> **Note 2:** Wingbardy = British imperialism, early constitutional monarchy (English Magna Carta), bourgeoisie dominance
> **Note 3:** The Battle of Mount Aris = The Battle of Britain
> **Note 4:** Skyfall/Chrysalis = opium wars, protection rackets

### Army Doctrines
* **Category:** SocietalDifferences
> **Note 0:** Dialectics - Atomic: Harmonic Solidarity
> Harmony isn't just being nice to each other, it's recognizing each others' special talents and working together (Friendship is Combined Arms). The strength of the Equestrian Army is not from conscription or horde aesthetics but from asset specificity and solidarity.
> The old army from the beginning of the war was a grand battleplan and all the ponies were told to stand in line and were worried cogs. All surrendered and captured at the beginning.
> **Note 1:** Dialectics - Atomic: Totalitarian Extractive Fascism
> The Nazi and Soviet model of mass conscription, disposable cogs, and terriefied masses will lose to a smaller elite force of asset specific volunteers.
> **Note 2:** Meta-Narrative - Subversion - Rejecting Mass Conscription
> Equestria does not represent WW2 Allies, it represents modern day. This is not a "war is hell" survival story, it is a thesis about modern, post-stagnation civic duty. Keeping the Equestrian Army volunteer-only mirrors the conditions of the West today. The story argues that the Equestrians in safe zones are not off the hook; they are obligated to support the volunteers (making weapons, donating love). The ponies have a choice to stay in Canterlot or go to Manehattan to work the home front for the army. The ones in Canterlot are eventually enslaved. Manehattan's total mobilization is not a mass industrial draft, it uses asset specificity (CMCs directing ponies to the right industries).

### Earth Pony Magic
* **Category:** MagicSystem
> **Note 7:** Usually earth pony magic acts slowly on a wide radius (their farm). Fleur invented a crystal pattern that can capture, redirect and concentrate earth pony magic into a single point, then packaged it into a shovel for digging. It takes the latent, slow acting and wide radius magic and concentrates it into fast acting and narrow focussed magic to make the earth easier to till. This was initially just for farming, but with some experimentation of the crystal pattern Fleur was able to make to destructive against the earth, allowing motivated earth ponies to dig entrenchments faster than any griffon ever could.
> **Note 6:** Mage Meadowbrook in 100 BLB (before Luna's banishment) was an empiricist who would state facts like "Earth ponies need pride in their land and also communal grace to not ruin the land". Meadowbrook understood the macro-mechanics and the sociology of the Charitostatic Effect. She observed that Earth Pony agriculture required a violent burst of pride/ambition, balanced by an equal amount of communal grace, otherwise the land was ruined.
>
> But no one in Equestria, not even in Celestia, truly knows about how earth pony magic works on a chemistry level. Celestia does know that earth ponies belong on the farm, and the earth ponies have folklore about loving their land (as seen by several comedic parts of canon FiM episodes where Applejack and the apple family treat their trees like newborns).They know that earth ponies are great at farming and they know from the time of survival harmony and pre-hearth's warming eve labor strikes that slavery doesn't work.
>
> If Celestia had subjected Earth Pony magic to rigorous scientific study, she would have realized it is a violent, high-energy thermodynamic process. She purposefully left it as "folklore" because acknowledging the raw, geological power of Earth Ponies would threaten the narrative of the peaceful, stagnant Nursery.
>
> Chemistry is not invented until around 880 ALB (after Luna's banishement) in Herzland under Grover III's scientific enlightenment.
>
> Fleur is the pioneer on understanding how it actually works in terms of chemistry. Griffons in Herzland have already invented fertilizer, but Fleur figures out that her own magic works on the same chemical principles of phosphorus and potassium weathering, and is tied to confidence and pride/will/ambition, just like unicorn magic and pegasus flight are tied to confidence and will/ambition. But because of the Aquileian feudal history of earth pony abuse, Fleur has an "agenda" to prove to her parents and herself that earth ponies are not magicless prey animals; Fleur lazer focuses on ambition and sovereinty as the forces that drive earth pony magic, not putting much study into the "grace" component.
>
> From her perspective, Equestrians are superstitious farmers playing with forces they don't understand. She believes Aquileia is superior because they have quantified the magic, transforming it into a hard science of asset specificity, thermodynamics, and chemistry.
> **Note 8:** earth pony magic is "dynamic weathering" for specific ratios of phosphorus and potassium based on what they're growing, and they get a discount for crops like their cutie mark
> **Note 1:** For an Earth pony, their land and their pride are their "Asset Specificity." Volunteering their farm to be destroyed is the highest possible form of patriotism. It proves the superiority of Harmonic Capitalism over Chrysalis's system: a Changeling drone fights because they are forced to, but a Tall Tale farmer will voluntarily sacrifice their own livelihood to protect their neighbors. They own their land, which means they have the sovereign right to destroy it for a greater cause.
> **Note 2:** "pride" and "ownership" are not truly the only catalysts for earth pony magic. It's epistemological bias from Fleur and Coltbert who think it's red love/ambition (pride equivalent in Aquileian griffon society) but perhaps it's pink love/grace too. The energy of being/contentment.
>
> They projected the pink love as "ownership" in Equestria. The reality is either red or pink love is needed. 
>
> Pre-Coltbert Equestria was only gray. The "Predator's Dilemma" of the feudal system destroys community trust. The serfs live in constant fear and trauma. They are alienated from the land and from each other, so there is no pink love. The serf owns nothing. They have no hope of advancement, no asset specificity, and no pride in their labor because the fruits of it are stolen, so there is no red love.
> **Note 3:** Concepts - Agrarian Industrial Weaponization
> Phosphor Bronze for heavy recoil springs and gears and tools - adding a small amount of phosphorus to copper and tin makes a resilient alloy
> White Phosphorus
> **Note 4:** Concepts - Magic Chemistry Synthesis
> Tzinacatl would use the phosphoric acid H3PO4 for their pivot from drugs to junk food
> Sodium tripolyphosphate for detergent
> Potassium salts for food preservation and culinary science. Used by SAA and Aquileian chefs rigorously. Also good for soaps
> **Note 5:** Nerve gases are known, but not used. Would Chrysalis use them against Stalliongrad? She would certainly not use them in Equestria because she views the soft Equestrians as livestock. Statthalters don't want to kill Stalliongradians, they want to enslave and train them personally and sadistically. Perhaps since Applejack has already shown she won't hesitate and Chrysalis knows Equestria can manufacture more nerve gas than her, she doesn't escalate? She is a tyrant, but rational and tactical. A lesser Chrysalis incarnation in a generic grimdark EaW story would do it, but mine won't?
> **Note 0:** Earth pony magic basically functions as magical fertilizer. In even more explicit terms invoking chemistry, earth pony magic acts on sediment. Phosphorus, potassium, and nitrogen are the principal macronutrients that plants need to grow. It is abundant in mineral form, but must be in a water soluable form for roots to absorb. Earth pony magic does a chemical reaction on sediment to make these three minerals water soluable. This is chemically infeasible in real life, but we're talking earth pony MAGIC! But none of this is visible on the surface. All Equestrians know is that earth ponies are good farmers and love their farms. The end result is that the farms are extremely productive. This may not even be classified as "magic" in the unicorn sense of the word. It's natural, or "just a thing", like pegasus flight.
> **Note 9:** After generations of accelerated weathering, eventually the soil would run out. "Rock Farming" is an ancient, misunderstood method of soil replenishment (mining raw mineral phosphates and physically seeding them into depleted soil so Earth Pony ambient magic can weather them)
> It became "folklore" within the stagnation of harmony
> **Note 10:** Because Celestia banned empirical chemistry before anyone in Equestria thought to apply it to agriculture, she literally does not possess the vocabulary to understand Earth Pony magic. She believes the folklore: “Earth Ponies grow food because they have a spiritual, harmonic bond with the soil.”
>
> Celestia did not ban heavy industry because she was hiding the explosive potential of Earth Pony phosphorus; she banned it because she genuinely believed the folklore. She believed that "Loving the soil and each other" was a fragile, spiritual state of grace that a steam engine would spiritually corrupt. Her terror is rooted in mysticism, not chemistry.
>
> Celestia didn't know that the "innocent folklore" of her Little Ponies was actually the exact same explosive chemistry that Grover III warned her about.

### Wings of Dew
* **Category:** Technology
> **Note 0:** The Aquileian chasseurs heard the Equestrian playground rhyme "Cross my heart, hope to fly, stick a cupcake in my eye!" through cultural exchange from the Manehattan parloirs to Aquileian social clubs. Because of the FJA/chasseur romantic/passionate bias, they translated "cross my heart" through a romantic lens. This rhyme is part of the inspiration for unicorn chasseurs to invent a spell that uses red love/active magic to create gossemer wings.
> **Note 1:** The spell hacks a non-flier's proprioceptive map to the magic wings. Once the wings are created, the creature channels their own active magic into the wings to manipulate wind and thermals to fly like a pegasus (the "hope to fly" part of the rhyme). In order to keep the wings of dew stable while all the red love passes through, the user must have faith that their chasseur partner will catch them if they fall (the "cross my heart" part of the rhyme). That's why the color of the wings reflects the color and wing style of one's partner, who will catch them if they fall (and more generally, keeps their hunter's spirit alive/gives them the ambition to fly)
>
> This mechanic of the wing color is taken from Steel Resolve's Rarishy story Green, but given a materialist explanation
> **Note 2:** Standard, active unicorn spells and griffon enchantments are scientifically called "thymodynamics" (thymo is the greek root for ambition or "to will" and dynamics means Force, power, change, heat)
>
> The romantic and passionate chasseurs labeled this new source of stabilizing magic "erodynamics" (ero for love and passion) because they believed the romantic devotion and passion to a partner is what allows the wings to stabilize.
>
> The chasseurs tap into the feeling of deep bonding after combat to recover from the adrenaline crash as an emotional force that can stabilize the wings
>
> The spell is called Ailes de Rosée (Wings of Dew) because dew is not a permanent structure; it forms only under highly specific, delicate atmospheric conditions, the right temperature and moisture. It is just like how the wings but be sustained by a balance of magic and friendship. The wings only stabilize when the caster's Red Love (the ambition to fly) is perfectly anchored by Pink Love (absolute, vulnerable trust in a Chasseur partner).
> **Note 3:** It is inspired by the intense chasseur bond that got binary pairs through the dangers of hunting warlords (they weaponized the "magic of connection" by cuddling for oxytocin, which calms the nervous system after the adrenaline withdrawl of a battle), which served as a blueprint that pink love/friendship/grace is powerful Magic too, complementary with red love/the raw magic of crystals or unicorn casting or active magic. The Chasseurs think they are flying because they are fueled by Erodynamic passion and elite martial superiority. But underneath that cultural armor, the two Chasseurs genuinely trust each other. They genuinely know their partner will catch them if they fall. Without realizing it, the Chasseurs are successfully executing a perfect "Pinkie Promise." The magic matrix stabilizes, not because of their fiery passion, but because of their unspoken, absolute vulnerability. They are not using erodynamics to fly, they are using charitostatics, a.k.a. the literal "Magic of Friendship"
> **Note 4:** Wings of dew working on earth ponies prove that earth ponies have magic, if the proof of agriculture isn't enough
> The spell is not just for earth ponies and unicorns, it also allows griffons and pegasi who were malnourished while growing up to fly better, completely subverting the Lion/noble hierarchy of feudal Aquileia.
>
> You have to have a genuine connection with others (assumed to be a passionate chasseur partner at the time), which means poseurs, nobles, and tycoons (pure lions) cannot use the wings of dew to fly - because they view the world entirely through transactional, zero-sum hoarding, they have no real friends and no grace, so the wings would disintegrate!
> **Note 5:** It does not make true, talent pegasi obsolete. The wings of dew allow a creature to fly like a generic pegasus, but pegasi have their special talents related to their cutie marks on top of standard pegasus wind manipulation-based flight
> **Note 6:** in the FJA culture where they have a lot of flings, the wings of dew indicate who is really their partner, if they truly feel that way about a particular creature. For example, Minette and Réni are chasseur partners and have deep emotion bonds. They still play around with others because they are ego driven and they can't biologically have children (yet, until post war with the conception spell matrix) but their wings of dew when they cast it always still reflect each other
>
> So this is a way to make the Aquileian culture a little less dystopian. Aquileian culture is built on Ego, performance with the asset specificity to back it, social armor, and the Tableau de Chasse. It runs the risk of looking like a shallow, hyper-sexualized dystopia. The Wings of Dew completely subvert that dystopia because Magic cannot lie. You can wear custom clothes to project an aura. You can sleep with other Lionesses or thugs to build your ego. But when you cast the Wings of Dew, the spell bypasses all the social posturing and taps into your absolute, bare psychological truth, and broadcasts it to everyone else.
> **Note 7:** Aquileian culture prides itself on "asset specificity"—having the best gear, the best product, the best social armor. The Wings of Dew prove that the most powerful, exclusive asset in the world cannot be hoarded. It is the trust of a partner that is broadcast by the wings and can't be faked.

### Pegasi Magic
* **Category:** MagicSystem
> **Note 0:** Their ability to create thunderstorms is the original, natural haber bosch process. The lightining splits N2 molecules which bond with oxygen and rain down as nitrates, fertilizing the soil.
> **Note 1:** After the defense of Mount Aris, the Aquileian volunteers teach the Wonderbolts how to harvest chemicals for munitions.
> Nitrocellulose = smokeless powder
> TNT
> Nitroglycerin
> **Note 2:** pegasi fly by manipulating air pressure, currents and thermals. Their wings contain the magical muscles to manipulate the weather.
> **Note 3:** Scootaloo can't fly properly because she grew up malnourished in New Mareland.

### Rebuilding Ain Trotgourait
* **Category:** Backstory
> **Note 4:** The West often engages in massive, top-down NGO charity—shipping free food or building expensive infrastructure in developing nations. While well-intentioned, this often destroys local agriculture and creates permanent dependency, leaving the nation utterly defenseless when the charity dries up or a warlord takes over.
>
> 1007 ALB expedition to Ain Trotgourait is the ultimate critique of the Western NGO complex. Twilight uses her Alicorn privilege to magically brute-force hospitals and water systems, entirely bypassing the local Zebrican capacity to build or defend it themselves. She creates a beautiful, defenseless "glass house" that effectively subsidizes Colthage and Chiropterra's eventual occupation.
> **Note 3:** Pinkie accompanies Twilight in Ain Trotgourait and she remembers every Zebra's name and greets them on the streets to spread smiles. This worked as genuine morale because the hippogriffs ensured military protection and the zebras are rebuilding steadily.
> **Note 7:** The city is occupied by Chirropterra and Colthage in the North Zebrican War which starts at some point during the Great War concurrently. By the end of the Great War, the hippogriffs have signed a white peace with Colthage, so the city is occupied but not a warzone.
> **Note 0:** It is a play on Aïn Tagourait, a real-life coastal municipality in Tipaza Province, northern Algeria. "Aïn" is Arabic for "spring" or "source." The city is the capital of Zumidia.
> In EaW, the hippogriffs launch a pre-emptive strike and destroy the Storm King's armada in the battle of Ain Trotgourait. In my lore, I am planning on having Ain Trotgourait get brutally sacked by the warlords as they are preparing to attack Mount Aris. After the battle, the hippogriffs take over and give aid to the ruined city's zebras.
> **Note 1:** Celestia says Tempest Shadow (Fizzlepop Berrytwist) is not welcome in Equestria because she is a warlord. Twilight is shattered by the idea that her mentor is refusing friendship. She still believes she is the Princess of Friendship, so she won't give up on Fizzlepop after promising redemption. So Twilight shuts down the School of Friendship and spends a year in Ain Trotgourait with Fizzlepop, Zecora and Pinkie doing top-down charity work to prove Celestia wrong.
> **Note 2:** Zecora was a harmonic chieftain of a zebra village in Zumidia that was destroyed by Chirropterra as they prepared for Nightmare Moon's return. Zecora traveled to the Everfree Forest on a suicide mission to somehow stop Nightmare Moon, arriving a few weeks before 1000 ALB. That's why the ponies of Ponyville just recently started seeing her visiting town and hiding, as per Bridle Gossip. Thanks to the Mane 6, Zecora didn't have to do anything, and decided to stay in the Everfree Forest since it had an absolute abundance of magical ingredients for zebra alchemy, plus she has no home to return to.
>
> When Twilight watches Zecora stay behind in the smoldering ruins of Ain Trotgourait, she sees what applied Harmony looks like. Zecora isn't teaching friendship via trust falls; she is combining Hippogriff capital with Zebra labor to build water filtration, hospitals, and defensive infrastructure. Zecora is fixing the material conditions that cause wars. Zecora stays in Ain Trotgourait permanently, leaving the Everfree Forest.
> **Note 6:** Twilight burned out after a year of trying to fix a city that was too big for her to fix everything. She retreated to her lab and devised magical systems that would automate her water purification spells using highest grade crystals from the crystal empire. But the moment the great war started, the changeling submarine blockade cut off the crystals, leaving Ain Trotgourait with toxic water once again.
> **Note 5:** Both Twilight and Fizzlepop are treating the Zebricans as subjects to be acted upon, rather than equals to be empowered. They are trying to impose Harmony from the outside.

### Caramel Marks' Communist Manifesto
* **Category:** Backstory
> **Note 0:** Baltimare should be the primary port for the drug tribes and always had corrupt ponies facilitating it with connections to Skyfall. This is Caramel Marks' hometown and explains the Marksist party which is why they lynch their tycoons for being collaborators
> **Note 1:** Caramel Marks' Communist Manifesto - Published in 990 ALB after Kemerskai's martial law, and he is actually the model. Caramel Marks is a bored pony (a baker) who took Chrysalis's shell company's offer to learn stuff and leave the nursery and go to Skyfall and she was horrified. Fire Angel is a griffon native to the rural land around Skyfall from before the revolution, independence and max capitalism. She was displaced and had to be a factory worker to survive.
>
> They essentially advocate that Kemerskai's command economy (a socialist utopia of price controls, rationed resources, a loabor backed fiat currency, absolute solidarity and no billionare tycoons) should be implemented globally and violently.
>
> They missed the fact that Kemerskai's constituents voted to suspend their own constitution in 986 and allowed the dissenters to leave on a 2nd long march to Skynavia and rehabbed their bandits. Severyana, totally oppressed by the industrializing boyars, ate it up as justification to take the factories from the boyars
> **Note 2:** Kemerskai is appalled and writes that it is a huge misinterpretation. He only instituted martial law and command economy to solve the resource scarcity, writing that he will restore elections as soon as possible
> **Note 3:** Caramel Marks did not originate in a trench or a sweatshop; she originated in a post-scarcity nursery. Her radicalization is born from culture shock, not material starvation. When she leaves the safety of Equestria and witnesses the brutal, zero-sum meatgrinder of Skyfall, her psychological architecture cannot process the friction. Because she was raised in a top-down, conflict-free society (Celestia's rule), she looks for a top-down, conflict-free solution to Skyfall's cruelty.
>
> This mirrors the modern phenomenon of affluent, college-educated youths adopting radical authoritarian aesthetics. They observe the alienating effects of late-stage capitalism but lack the "Resilience" or historical context to engage in the messy, incremental friction of democratic reform (the Aquileian FJA model). Instead, they reach for the most absolute, violent lever available because it promises an immediate, sterilized utopia.
> **Note 4:** The fatal flaw of the Manifesto is its epistemological blindness to Consent and Context. Kemerskai instituted the command economy in 986 ALB as a desperate, temporary survival mechanism to prevent the Cloudburian refugees and Herzlander exiles from starving in the snow. Furthermore, the Republic voted to suspend its own constitution, and Kemerskai permitted ideological dissenters (Sickleclaw’s agrarian communists and Rosewing’s bandits) to physically leave the system.
>
> Caramel Marks and Fire Angel strip away the democratic consent and the existential context. They look at Kemerskai’s martial law and mistake a state of emergency for a utopian baseline. The meta-critique is that modern authoritarian-leftists often idolize the brutalist aesthetics, price controls, and purges of historical regimes (like the USSR) while completely ignoring that those systems were forged in the apocalyptic fires of civil war and famine. By demanding that Kemerskai’s temporary survival tactics be implemented "globally and violently," the Manifesto advocates for a permanent state of emergency.
> **Note 5:** When the Severyanan workers read the Manifesto, they use it to justify the slaughter of the industrializing Boyars. However, because the Manifesto misinterprets Kemerskai, Stalliongrad builds a fundamentally broken machine.
>
> Kemerskai’s ultimate goal was to build enough industrial capacity so that the State could eventually step back and guarantee individual dignity (the return of elections in 996). Stalliongrad, following the Manifesto, permanently institutionalizes the "Cog" mentality. They eradicate the Predator's Dilemma by ensuring no pony has any Asset Specificity whatsoever. If everyone is an interchangeable, standardized unit of labor, no one can be exploited as a unique asset. This perfectly justifies why Stalliongrad forces its citizens into the horrific, human-wave meatgrinder against Chrysalis's Heer. They achieved absolute equality, but they sacrificed the soul of the worker to get it. It is the dark mirror to Star Energy’s Harmonic Capitalism.
> **Note 6:** his origin for the Manifesto perfectly contextualizes Starlight Glimmer’s canon cult in Our Town. If Starlight read Caramel Marks’s text at age 10, her actions become a direct, logical application of its flawed thesis.
>
> Starlight interpreted "absolute solidarity and no billionaires" through the lens of Equestrian biological determinism. She deduced that the ultimate source of inequality was not capital, but Cutie Marks (Asset Specificity). Our Town is the Manifesto executed on a micro-scale: a command economy where the "Dictatorship of the Proletariat" is enforced by magically lobotomizing everyone's special talents. It connects the geopolitical macro-conflicts of Griffonia directly to the localized, character-driven conflicts of Equestria.
> **Note 7:** Because Stalliongrad operates on the Manifesto's mandate of standardization and top-down command, they are tactically inflexible. This allows Trimmel’s Auftragstaktik (independent mission command) to easily encircle and annihilate them. The Manifesto inadvertently builds the exact type of rigid, unimaginative army that the Changeling armored spearheads were designed to crush.

### Ancient Equestria (Before Luna Banishment)
* **Category:** History
> **Note 0:** Trimmel, Thranx, Ixodida and Elvir Roland interview arrogant Star Swirl the Bearded who says the Tree of Harmony is a product of magical experimentation from 1000 years ago. Whenever it detects a spike of red love, it comes up with a pink love solution. This is the origin of Rainbow Power and the Cutie Map. So Trimmel uses this VOPS intel as proof that he is superior than the statthalters and designate a soft occupation for Equestria. The invasion is too mechanized, large scale, and ambiguous, so the tree doesn't give a response.
> **Note 1:** Star Swirl and the other pillars of old Equestria have a top down feudal mindset. They think they just need to be nice examples and all the ponies will follow. It's the same problem that Grover III faced. The 2nd gen would grow up safe and ungrateful.
> They planted the tree of harmony, so the cutie map and the chest operate on their principles
> **Note 3:** Star Swirl is like Gerad Discret, a magical apex predator using overwhelming force to make other predators behave. The Tree of Harmony was intended to be like Gerad Discret's "King's Peace", an absolute, top-down law that enforces pacifism by defanging threats.
> **Note 4:** This manifested in the cutie map, which detects conflicts and dispatches the mane 6 to solve the symptom with a friendship lesson without addressing the root cause that caused the predatory red love spike.
> **Note 6:** Celestia and Luna grew up in a time of "survival harmony". There is grassroots harmony between the four tribes, but only to defend local settlements from monsters. The earth ponies farm, the pegasi control the weather, the unicorns at Canterlot move the sun and the moon, both pegasi and unicorns defend from monsters during the day, and thestrals defend from monsters at night.
> **Note 7:** Hearth's Warming Eve in reality was labor strikes that caused a blizzard, but the ponies recite the tale as a reminder of why they must always cooperate to survive against the monsters.
> **Note 8:** Unicorns had to move the sun and moon because plans require a diurnal cycle. Sunlight for photosynthesis during the day, and darkness for respiration and cooling at night. Also, thermal gradients are necessary to create wind and potential energy differentials for pegasi to create any weather.
> **Note 9:** They had to mine tons of crystals from Canterlot until Star Swirl invented alicorn spell for Celestia and Luna
> **Note 10:** Ponies in equestria cleared the monsters 1000 years ago because they are herbivores with an agriculture system 
> Griffons and changelings eat the monsters
> **Note 11:** The pillars of old equestria 
> Rockhoof and flash Magnus are in Blueblood's army. Stygian is a tactician
> Star Swirl was doing nonviolent magical research with Twilight. When she leaves, Celestia has him continue 
> Somnambula is in Maregypt
> Mistmane is a medic?
> Mage meadowbrook is in the south east with the thestrals? With the Aquileian-aligned tribes?
> I forgot their lore, need to review
> **Note 2:** Mage Meadowbrook is an Earth Pony from the Hayseed Swamps; she is the Pillar of Healing. She invented friendship plants for the Tzinacatl in the jungle so they could counteract the red love flora and fauna from the windigo corruption. This concept was scaled up to the Tree of Harmony, which absorbs latent friendship (the charitostatic effect) nationwide to charge the Elements of Harmony with pure pink love/friendship to blast magical apex predators like Discord and Tirek and Nightmare Moon. The elements are useless against mechanical tanks or a decentralized horde of changelings.
>
> The Pillars planted the seed shortly before going into stasis to subdue the Pony of Shadows, believing that if their good Stygian could fall to darkness, the six of them would succumb sooner or later. The tree which would eventually bear the fruit (The Elements) would have a magical safety lock so that only ponies with a healthy balance of pink and red could wield them, and subdue any out of control apex predator.
> **Note 5:** The Tree does not activate against Rockfeller or Gilded Trust because a CEO is not a magical anomaly. The Tree cannot detect "Systemic Economic Extraction" because it was only programmed to detect "Magical WMDs." This forces the ponies to realize that ancient magical artifacts cannot solve modern sociological problems.
>
> This should be a commentary/allegory for the systemic problems of today while everyone is only looking at the surface level plain-faced problems

### Cutie Map
* **Category:** Technology
> **Note 0:** The cutie map breaks down and goes dormant after Mount Aris because the Mane 6 no longer believe in the stagnation of harmony. Rainbow militarizing, Twilight and Pinkie doing top down charity, and Applejack, Rarity and Fluttershy alienated and feeling small
> **Note 1:** The stagnation of harmony is under assault from Skyfall rugged individualism mindset. The map missions are for the mane 6 to go and remind the ponies about harmony.
> **Note 2:** Hasbro's "Mission of the Week" toy-selling formula into an automated surveillance tool for Celestia's Stagnation of Harmony.
> **Note 3:** Algorithmic Pacification: In an ambitious society (like Aquileia), political and economic friction is natural; it leads to negotiation, unions, and progress. But the Tree of Harmony views all friction (Skyfall rugged individualism, labor disputes, ambition) as a dangerous spark of Red Love.

### Aeronautical Engineering
* **Category:** Technology
> **Note 12:** It's like how in Hearts of Iron IV, when I build 1940s fighters ahead of time they absolutely shred the AI's outdated planes. We're talking 40 losses on my side, 300 losses on their side.
> **Note 11:** Unicorn can shield the back of the fighter during air to air combat. Once air superiority is won, the fighter can dive bomb the enemy ground troops with their white phosphorus rounds to shred supply trucks and the unicorn can bombard tanks and trenches with destructive spells. No need to allocate space for bomb bays. It's hybrid fighter+CAS
> The Aquileian unicorns used crystal enhancers
> **Note 4:** Timeline - 995 ALB
> After conquering Vedina, the Griffonian Republic delivers an ultimatium to Haukland to surrender or face invasion. Hermann Meyer, being somewhat of a pragmatic coward, begins negotiations.
> Dennis Discret seizes the opportunity and takes Hermann Meyer for the Royal Aquileian fleet. They are old privateer friends from before 978. Dennis wants Meyer to help as deterrance in case Skyfall tries to stop them. Meyer traditionally raided shipping with his airforce, which is why Skyfall needed shipping insurance in the first place.
>
> Hermann Meyer took Dennis Discret's offer and abondoned his country. This turned out to backfire since his rivals in Haukland ended up joining Skyfall shipping companies. Now both navies had naval bomber capabilities.
>
> Hermann Meyer took the air force to the island of Haukland, where the pirates get to own their planes. That's where they figure out they can use traditional griffon artisanship to make enchanted aluminum armor for their planes. They wouldn't have the chance to do that in a state-owned air force that uses planes off an assembly line. Hermann Meyer taught Reni and others how to forge their own artisan enchanted planes, intending to be naval bombers in case the Skyfall fleet attacks. He aligns well with ego-capitalism and asset specificity. He is not a Herzlander bore, he is eccentric!
> **Note 0:** Baseline: German WW2 Bf 109 fighter - They can only fire standard machine guns for 15 seconds per sortie
> Ju 87 Stuka CAS (with Jericho Trumpets) - only one big anti tank bomb and 4 small bombs per sortie
> Uses aviation gasoline (av gas) that runs at 25%-30% efficiency. Low efficiency due to incomplete combustion and heat loss
> Diesel engines ran at 35%-40% efficiency in WW2 era
> **Note 1:** Star Energy hybrid engines take in av gas and contains a spell matrix that snap long, straight hydrocarbon chains into tightly branched iso-octane that burns cleaner, so the engine runs at 50% efficiency of the av gas. The spell matrix needs highest grade crystals (and later red love canisters), but is extremely light for the amount of potential energy within the crystal, making this hybrid av gas/crystal engine perfect for elite planes for Aquileian aces and Wonderbolts.
> **Note 3:** Timeline - 981 ALB
> Hermann Meyer and the Republican Airforce desert during the Long March and fly their planes to Haukland to form a pirate state. Since they are now the law and without state air force ownership of planes, the ace pilots experiment with building their own planes, forging their own aluminum frames and getting traditional griffon artisan enchantments when they fly their planes.
> **Note 5:** Timeline - 1003 ALB
> The Crystal Empire reappears. Cadance and Shining Armor recruit parloir owners to help the crystal ponies process the trauma of Sombra's slavery, and the parloir connection leads to Aquileian connections. The Aquileian artisan ace pilots from the navy work with the University of Pridea and Star Energy Corporation to make better plane engines so they can fly faster and longer. They also adopt crystal tips on their bullets so the ammo weighs less.
> **Note 7:** Timeline - 1007 ALB
> After the Defense of Mount Aris, the Wonderbolts with help from the Aquileians and the University of Pridea make ways of harvesting hyper-nitrogen/polynitrogen for bullets directly from clouds and thunderstorms, making their bullets fire at Mach 4 speeds compared to standard machine gun Mach 2 running on historical nitrocellulose. The standard Wonderbolts Spitfire planes also have heavy armor which lets them strafe ground targets and even the tops of tanks with their mach 4 ammo, removing the need for dedicated CAS (unicorns on board take out tanks with crystal enhancers). They use smoothbore barrels and sabots because of how fast their ammo comes out; rifling would cause too much heat. The bulots need aerodynamic fins to stay stable in flight since there's no spinning from rifling. The bullets also have white phosphorus from Star Enerrgy in Tall Tale.
>
> Wonderbolts ammo = brass casing sabot + fins + crystal tip + polynitrogen + white phosphorus
> **Note 9:** During the Great War, the Wonderbolts and Aquileian Aces can fire machine guns for 50+ seconds and bomb tanks with unicorns while the changelings can only fire for 15 seconds and need separate CAS with only one big bomb. But the Wonderbolts supply chain is weak compared to the changeling mass produced swarm. The Wonderbolts look invicible but are unsustainable (until love donators)
> **Note 8:** Timeline - 1008 ALB
> At the end of the Second Great Leap Forward, Chrysalis's plane manufacturers solidify on the Bf 109 fighter and Ju 97 Stuka CAS with Jericho Trumpets for psychological terror (the ultimate poseur). They use these during the invasion of Olenia where the Olenians surrender fast.
> **Note 10:** The Aquileian aces built their own planes so they are super lightweight with magical enchantments from forger's pride. The Wonderbolts use their flying instincts in their planes for supreme situational awareness. The changeling fighter pilots are completely unmatched, relying on equipment reading and rigid formations. The dive bombers are sitting ducks.
> **Note 6:** Timeline - 1006 ALB
> The Defense of Mount Aris. The Wonderbolts are flying donated WW1-era outdated biplanes from the Griffonian Republic and Kingdom of Aquileia, but since they are ace fliers they can manipulate air currents and it's sufficient against airships
> **Note 13:** Real life fighter doctrines
> WW1 Biplanes used Turn and Burn, where they get behind the enemy and shoot at their tail
> WW2 Monoplanes used Boom and Zoom where they dive down at the enemy from above
> **Note 2:** Timeline - 972 ALB
> Once Wingbardy declares independence from the Empire, the Wingbardian aviation industry takes off rapidly, first used at scale in the Falcor War. Prior to independence, airplanes were taboo due to Herzlander Archon dogma about flight being a privilege of the noble knights. Wingbarian industries make use of their aluminum and rubber to mass produce planes to fight the Empire if they attacked, and then used for the Falcor War.
>
> The Imperial Army must begin adopting planes to stay on top, but they restrict it to nobility.
> Timeline - 978 ALB
> The Republican Revolution unlocks the aviation industry to all griffons who want to be pilots.

### Star Energy Tech
* **Category:** Technology
> **Note 0:** Worked with the Crystal Empire and University of Pridea
> **Note 1:** Traditional (and real world) oil refining has the following three steps:
> 1. Distillation to sort the crude oil
> 2. Cracking to turn heavy long carbon chains into smaller gasoline and diesel
> 3. Reformer to fold the straight chains into highly branched isomers for more complete combustion
>
> Star Energy invented a spell matrix that does the Reforming step using unicorn magic and can be powered by crystals. This is used in their hybrid engines to get more complete combustion and therefore more efficiency.
> Should it be used in the refinery too? Or just in the engine? What would make more sense?
>
> Maybe the point of using the crystal in the engine is to simplify the refinery? Or because the Aquileians did not own the refinery and got trash oil. They were dealing with hostile power monopolies
> **Note 2:** They invented engines that use diesel plus crystals
> The crystals are for running a spell matrix that makes the carbon chains branched for more complete combustion
> It should also have another spell matrix equivalent to what a turbo does, to make use of heat and high pressure?

### Royal Aquileian Navy
* **Category:** Organization
> **Note 1:** Gerad Discret trained some traumatized 1st gen Royalist crews and pays them an efficiency wage. Not many traumatized former serfs or house ponies want to go out on the dangerous ocean, even with higher wages, so Gerad Discret's fleet is small. Gerad Discret's culture is ultra chaste out of respect for victims of warlords. So female griffonesses and all kinds of ponies are welcome and fully respected on a professional Royalist ship.
> **Note 2:** Timeline - 980 ALB
> Verany's revolution seized Gerad Discret's fleet and fired the Royalist crews. The fleet was destroyed by Skyfall privateers in the counterrevolution.
> **Note 3:** Coltbert rehires the chaste Royalist crews for shipping protection. Dennis Discret first accepts the job and double crosses Skyfall's privateers because as the captain of a royalist crew, the crew bows to him just like they once did for his uncle Gerad Discret.
> **Note 5:** Coltbert mandates a diverse half-griffon half-pony crew that requires asset specificity (and subtly balances the genders).
>
> Everyone has a "peaceful shipping escort" role of ship maintenance and a "monster hunting role" during combat
>
> Pegasi fly ahead to clear weather
> Unicorns have various utility spells
> Griffons bring their own machines on board to perform various utilities and on board manufacturing or processing of loot
>
> Need more details
> **Note 4:** Historically, galleons needed masses of unskilled men to pull ropes or act as cannon fodder. Coltbert and Dennis Discret design their new fleet so that brute force is obsolete.
> To get a berth on an Aquileian ship, you must possess Asset Specificity.
>
> Coltbert recruits all-new crews from the countryside for more shipping protection to export goods to Equestria, but also with a side-mission of monster hunting, reviving Grover III's tradition.
>
> Skyfall ships divert away from monsters as poseurs, but Royal Aquileian Navy ships escorting Aquileian vessels are not doing it for profit margins, they are doing it for pride. So if they detect sea monsters, they could divert from the shipping lane to take on the monsters, living out Grover III's legend.
>
> Coltbert and Dennis Discret do not frame recruitment as a patriotic duty to die for the King. They frame it as a Venture Capital Pitch for Artisans. The Academy is pitched as a ground-up community collective where everyone joins as a shareholder of export escort profits and monster hunting profits. They are sailing to get rich, but to get rich through mutual cooperation, completely subverting the Skyfall model of getting rich through extortion.
> **Note 6:** Earth ponies use their magic and various crystal matrix filters (akin to the star spade) that manipulate their phosphorus and potassium magic to keep food fresh and delicious, so no one gets scurvy or other diseases or have to eat slop
>
> they rapidly weather raw minerals (stored potash and rock phosphate) directly into the ship’s food and water supply
>
> How should this really work?
> **Note 0:** Traditionally, a Grover III-era monster hunting vessel was a floating fortress of chivalry with knights flying out to slay monsters. The crew revered the knights and were paid efficiency wages for their bravery.
> Grover IV-era shipping escorts featured "poseur" children of monster hunting knights. The crew became a race to the bottom of desperate serfs who accepted the lowest pay for grunt work since the ships avoid monsters and have huge cannons if in a bind. The ships were still officially Imperial, flying the flag of Boreas, but the captains were treating their crews like disposable factory cogs to maximize trade profits.
>
> A Skyfall crew is bound by Debt and Greed. When the merchants stole the fleet, they stripped the Imperial eagles off the bows and replaced them with company logos. Discipline is enforced by the threat of starvation and breached contracts. A Skyfall privateer ship is a Floating Sweatshop built on the Predator's Dilemma. There is zero working-class solidarity on a Skyfall ship; the crew is held together purely by fear and the promise of loot. The crew tolerates the brutal, abusive conditions because they buy into the Skyfall lie: If I work hard enough and hoard enough loot, I will eventually become the Captain/CEO and get to be the one holding the whip. Because this is a zero-sum, aggressive environment lacking the social safety nets of the Republic or the cultural etiquette of Aquileia, it is overwhelmingly male manosphere griffons. A pony or a griffoness would never willingly join a Skyfall privateer crew because the absence of any "Social Cost" on a closed ship makes them immediate targets for abuse.
>
> A Skyfall captain cannot sleep soundly. He knows his crew has no loyalty to him. If the ship begins to take on water or a battle turns poorly, the crew will mutiny, steal the remaining gold, and flee, because "every griffon for himself" is the only rule they respect.
> **Note 7:** Because every role is a highly specialized, respected artisan craft, there is no room for the "Manosphere" grift. This gives the Aquileian Navy a beautiful, hyper-competent identity. They are a floating collective of scientists, blacksmiths, and weather-shapers who just happen to be driving a heavily armed warship.
> **Note 8:** Just like the original Chasseurs sharing a mess tin in the freezing mountains, these FJA sailors bond through the shared trauma and adrenaline of the sea. When a crew navigates a Leviathan attack or outmaneuvers a Skyfall warship through pure synchronized skill, the artificial barriers of race, gender, and background evaporate entirely. They become a family forged in saltwater.
> **Note 9:** They have a book of tasks they are obligated to do each day, it doubles as the tableau de chasse 
> They keep each other accountable on the ship maintenance tasks
> They reserve flings on the calendar
> Also all the mares and griffonesses have ovulation cycle calendars in the book
> So they also verify the calendars to make sure everything is safe, all the men do this too
> It's high trust, transparency, mutual accountability, and max passion
> The small window of safety with same species is highly anticipated throughout the month
> **Note 10:** These 2nd gen crews are essentially floating FJA clubs
>
> The Ship Class Name: Frégate de la Jeunesse d'Avant-Garde (Vanguard Youth Frigate)
> The ship is outfitted with asset specific equipment, not mass muscle
> **Note 11:** The largest demographics are 2nd gen royalists (who grew up safe, bored, and ambitious, and don't have ancestral terroir but lots of wit, charm and intelligence and drive) and chasseurs. Then ponies and griffons who simply don't want to follow in their parents' footsteps and their siblings are around to take care of their land.
> **Note 12:** The "Berth Cohort" Application System (Scaling the Chasseur Model)
>
> In Part 1 of his game, Coltbert built the Académie Royale des Compagnons d'Armes around the "Binary Unit"—forcing a Griffon and a Pony to pair up to break down species barriers through shared survival. For the Naval Academy, he scales this up to solve the gender balance.
>
> You cannot apply to the Naval Academy as a lone individual. You must apply as a fully formed "Watch" or "Berth Team" (e.g., four cadets: one male pony, one female pony, one male griffon, one female griffon).
> This forces grassroots recruitment of respectful male griffons who need actual friends to join the academy
> **Note 13:** Operate in a confined, inescapable ecosystem for months at a time hunting monsters and Skyfall pirates. They cannot afford spontaneity because a single mistake sinks the ship. Therefore, their intimacy must be highly regulated, transparent, and scheduled.
> the Chasseurs prove that passion can win wars, and the Navy proves that passion can sustain infrastructure
> **Note 14:** They have a book of tasks they are obligated to do each day, it doubles as the tableau de chasse
>
> They reserve flings on the calendar
> **Note 15:** They keep each other accountable on the ship maintenance tasks
> Doing chores becomes an act of seduction and a display of Asset Specificity. Mutual accountability replaces the captain's whip. The crew doesn't need a tyrant to keep them in line because peer pressure and the desire for social/romantic reward drive absolute perfection.
> **Note 16:** In a hyper-lethal environment like monster-hunting at sea, a pregnancy isn't just a personal matter; it is a critical logistical failure that removes a highly specialized asset from the crew and endangers the ship.
> The Traditional Feudal Solution: Ban women from ships entirely (and captured women get abused as a result), or enforce draconian, puritanical chastity (Gerad's Royalists)
> The Aquileian Solution: Radical transparency and scientific management.
> **Note 17:** All the mares and griffonesses have ovulation cycle calendars
> So they also verify the calendars to make sure everything is safe, all the men do this too
> It's high trust, transparency, and mutual accountability
> The small window of safety with same species is highly anticipated throughout the month
>
> Cross-species flings are the "baseline" of safe, recreational ambition. Same-gender flings naturally arise as the tightly knit and passionate crew want to expand, once already having a fling with most of the baseline. The small, infertile "safe window" for same-species/opposite gender flings becomes a highly coveted, mathematically precise event. It adds a fascinating layer of anticipation and cultural rhythm to the voyage. The entire crew is invested in the calendar's accuracy, creating an intense, shared communal bond.
> **Note 18:** Skyfall Ships: Run on the Predator's Dilemma. The Captain is the predator, the crew are disposable prey. There is zero trust. If a Skyfall ship gets hit by a sea monster, the crew might mutiny or flee because they have no stake in the vessel.
>
> Aquileian Ships: Run on Harmonic Capitalism. Because the crew are highly specific assets who trust each other with their lives, their bodies, and their reputations, they will fight to the bitter end to protect their floating community.
> **Note 19:** Once the bootstrapping pipeline for spell matrices in Pridea is proven, the fleet runs protection of trade routes with New Mareland and Sicameon to get crystals for spell matrices, then flex their new weapons against Skyfall and Wingbardian privateers and use them for maritime monster hunting

### Aquileian Anti-Poseur Crusade
* **Category:** Backstory
> **Note 0:** Aquileian volunteers in the navy, lionesses, reformed thugs who went to Skyfall
> the most passionate ideological anti-poseur anti Skyfall Aquileians, the ones who don't fall into pure cultural elitism and get tired of the unending game against the tycoons, realize the scale of the system.
>
> They use their absolute monopoly on high-culture (fine dining, artisanal goods) to financially humiliate the Skyfall tycoons. They charge the executives extortionate prices for luxury dinners, then use those profits to subsidize cheap, high-quality, real food for the Zebrican immigrant workers.
> The Naive Hope: They believe they can solve the problem through Human Capital Transfer . They think if they feed the workers, treat them with dignity, and teach them artisanal skills or trades, those workers will return to Zebrica, start their own businesses, and build local wealth.
> The Flaw: It is purely localized and ignores the geopolitical reality. They are treating a systemic macroeconomic parasite with soup kitchens and good vibes.
>
> The Aquileians realize that even if a worker saves up enough hard currency and returns home, a Storm King warlord will just point a Herzlander rifle at them and take it. They realize that Skyfall wants the Aquileians to feed the workers, because it just lowers the cost of living for the workers, allowing Skyfall to pay them even less. The Aquileians are inadvertently subsidizing Skyfall's sweatshops.
> To actually free the human capital of Zebrica, they have to physically destroy the parasitic extraction layer: the warlords.
>
> That's why they join up with the navy to fight warlords in Mount Aris 
>
> the painful transition from naive, theoretical idealism to hard, materialist action
> **Note 1:** After the Defense of Mount Aris, they go for attack statthalter slaver islands and turn them into Aquileian colonies, earnestly granting citizenship (unlike the real French)
>
> The unsanctioned operation is not run by "Baron Dennis Discret, admiral of the royal Aquileian navy". It should hilariously be "Dennis the pirate" wearing his old eye patch, not his royal uniform
> **Note 8:** They learn from Thorax in the Crystal Empire the difference between jaegers/statthalters and conscripts
> **Note 9:** During the initial battle, they aren't sitting idly in Tall Tale, they fight at the border but quickly retreat as the Equestrian line rapidly collapses and they go to their base in Tall Tale
> **Note 7:** When Celestia dismisses their warnings, they go to the Crystal Empire where Cadance is not delusional. Cadance and the Crystal Ponies ramp up crystal mining for Aquileian weapons.
> **Note 6:** The Aquileians see the changeling military build up and have verbal talks with Olenians to help them fight.
> Chrysalis starts proxy civil wars in Yakyakistan and Nova Griffonia to distract the Aquileians ahead of the full on mechanized invasion of Olenia, which the Olenia surrender fast before the Aquileians can finish the civil wars.
> **Note 2:** one of the Statthalter islands collapse from a slave revolt but the Statthalters brutally reconquer it. Then some former slaves who escaped make it to Aquileia and appeal to Dennis Discret to liberate the rest. When the FJA crews hear about the Statthalters, and also they are lacking monsters to hunt since the jaeger subs got them all, they want to take out the Statthalters in a glorious unsanctioned pirate war.
>
> The Statthalters are the ultimate "Poseurs." They claim the status of apex predators, but they don't even hunt their own prey—they buy slaves from Zebrican warlords using obsolete guns. Even worse, they take the extracted Red Love, sell it, and use the money to buy FJA premium goods (Aquileian wine and clothes) to posture as cultured elites.
>
> The cash crops of Les Méridiennes were not produced through the pride and Asset Specificity of the worker (the core thesis of Coltbert’s Harmonic Capitalism). They were produced through the absolute, industrialized erasure of the worker's soul. The Statthalters mocked the economic religion of Aquileia. Dennis Discret and the FJA volunteers do not just want to free the slaves; they want to obliterate the physical evidence of their own cultural humiliation. They must burn the islands to prove that Aquileian Grace cannot be safely mimicked by predators.
>
> The royal aquileian navy literally views freeing the pirate islands as the exact same as the chasseur hunt against the warlords and implementing the exact Coltbert Reforms on the islands, which are asset specific plantations
>
> the Aquileians already have high tolerance for cultural diversity since the different regions of Aquileia have different local cultures and accents, as if it is like Occitan, Burgundian, Breton, Gascon, etc. and these were not erased the way the real French central states erased them. So they wouldn't erase local zebrican cultures of the freed slaves, they would just require them to also learn "King's Aquileian" (the dialect used for official business)
>
> But since the slaves are from different parts of Zebrica they end up erasing themselves to be standard Aquileians
>
> They don't find out about changelings or love harvesters until after they hear testimony from the locals
> **Note 3:** The FJA Colonial Model: "The Earnest French Empire"
> The Dutch VOC were pure violence and extraction
> The British ran a heavily stratified system of indirect rule
> The real French empire claimed they were built on universal republican values. On paper, they promised Assimilation. They told their subjects: "If you learn the French language, adopt French culture, and become educated, you will be recognized as a full French citizen with equal rights." The reality was it was a poseur lie. They made the bar for citizenship impossibly high, keeping 99% of their subjects economically marginalized and subject to forced labor (corvée).
>
> The FJA are not poseurs; they take the French model and actually do it earnestly. When Dennis Discret and the FJA liberate the Zebrican slaves, they don't treat them as sub-creatures. They give the former slaves ownership of the plantations, flood the islands with food and capital goods, and the University of Pridea starts studying the magic of the various creatures (zebras, cats, horses, etc.)
> **Note 4:** They care more about freeing and uplifting the ambitious former slaves than caring for the unambitious wallflowers at home, which can sort of be a mirror for how Western elites act today and why nationalism is on the rise
>
> To the FJA, helping a Zebrican slave is a romantic adventure; helping a depressed Aquileian accountant is bureaucratic and boring.
>
> In the Aquileian model, the economy is sustained by the "Patriot Discount" and the relentless pursuit of Terroir. The system requires constant, high-energy performance to out-compete Skyfall's economies of scale. If the culture allowed slowing down, they would start losing to the imperialist poseurs they are shaming.
> **Note 5:** they view Chrysalis as a poseur for letting her changelings commit the worst atrocities imaginable and not flying the changeling flag over the slaver islands

### Chasseur Doctrine
* **Category:** SocietalDifferences
> **Desc:** How to manage the adrenaline of battle, the subsequent crash afterwards, and restoring morale and combat effectiveness through mutual connection instead of alcohol or drugs like how armies did historically.
> **Note 0:** The Tzinacatl have fought ceremonial, bloodless wars for a millennium, relying on blowguns, darts, and extreme warrior posturing. Engaging in high-adrenaline combat and paking performance-enhancing stimulants. To survive 1000 years of this cycle, the Tzinacatl must have developed pharmacological countermeasures. While the "Drug Tribes" grew stimulants for the black market, the "Medicine Tribes" had herbs and alchemical treatments. They also had birth control.
> That's why the medicinal tribes are the perfect recruits to run the Manehattan parloirs. They aren't just good listeners; they are generational masters of neurochemical decompression. They know exactly how to guide a stressed entity from a "Lion" state back to an "Eagle" state without causing psychological whiplash.
> **Note 1:** the chasseurs cuddle after a battle to recover from the adrenaline crash and have sex after a boring trek for mutual dopamine and deep sleep
> **Note 2:** Testosterone (The "Lion" Primer)
>
> It is an androgen, dominant in biological males. It directly influences the brain's amygdala (threat response) and the mesolimbic pathway (reward/dopamine).
>
> Testosterone is the hormone of Status-Seeking and Territoriality. It lowers the threshold for aggression, increases risk tolerance, and makes the brain highly receptive to dopamine rewards acquired through competition. It makes an individual want to conquer obstacles to assert dominance.
>
> In TLTT Context: High testosterone makes accessing raw "Red Love" incredibly easy. It is the biological engine idling in the background that makes a creature constantly crave the "Apex" dopamine rush.
> **Note 3:** Estrogen (The "Eagle" Primer)
>
> Dominant in biological females, estrogen interacts heavily with serotonin and oxytocin receptors.
>
> Estrogen is the hormone of Social Cohesion and Stress Modulation. It promotes risk-aversion, empathy, and communal behavior. Crucially, estrogen acts as a massive amplifier for oxytocin—meaning estrogen-dominant brains are biologically wired to feel profound relief and connection from physical intimacy and harmony.
>
> In TLTT Context: High estrogen makes accessing "Pink Love" incredibly easy. It lowers the desire for zero-sum competition and increases the desire for positive-sum cooperation.
> **Note 4:** Griffons are biological apex predators. A male griffon has the baseline testosterone of a lion, meaning his brain is permanently flooded with a desire for status, dominance, and territorial control. When this biology is combined with the poverty of Aquileia's slums or Skyfall's rat race, it creates the toxic "Manosphere Thug". They are biologically screaming for a dopamine/Red Love fix, and the easiest way to get it is through violence.
>
> A female griffon still has predatory instincts, but her estrogen promotes risk-aversion. Historically, because pregnancy meant physical vulnerability and loss of economic shifts, her biology forced her to suppress her ambition. This created the Herzland Patriarchy: males got to be Lions, while females were forced to be Eagles.
>
> As herbivores, ponies naturally have lower testosterone and higher communal/estrogen profiles than griffons. Celestia's "Stagnation of Harmony" relies on this biology. She removed all external stressors, allowing the ponies' natural estrogen/oxytocin loops to dictate their entire society—resulting in a peaceful but entirely un-ambitious nursery.
> **Note 5:** Coltbert and the chasseurs prove that biology is not destiny when Asset Specificity is involved.
>
> Because ponies and griffons cannot biologically reproduce,the Aquileians can decouple "Lion/Eagle" from "Male/Female." An Aquileian pony mare (like Minette) is no longer bound by her estrogen's risk-aversion. She can safely step onto the streets and initiate high-stakes dominance games. The Lionesses understand that male griffon thugs are slaves to their testosterone. The thug approaches the Lioness looking for a cheap, violent dopamine hit. By using the Lioness Spell to repel his violence, she denies him that hit. She then forces him to act like an "Eagle" (learning manners, bowing, cooking) to gain access to her. The true genius of the Lionesses is that they don't chemically castrate the griffons. Once the thug proves he can suppress his violent testosterone and access his oxytocin (Pink Love/Grace), the mare allows him to be the "Lion" in the bedroom. She gives his brain the exact testosterone/dopamine reward it was craving, but she forces him to earn it through consent and refinement rather than terror.
> **Note 6:** Coltbert did not just encourage intimacy among the Chasseurs to be scandalous; he engineered the Académie Royale des Compagnons d'Armes to exploit this exact endocrinological cycle to destroy feudal racism.
>
>     The Combat Overdose (Red Love): When a mixed-species "Binary Unit" (a Griffon and a Pony of opposite genders) enters a firefight, their nervous systems are completely flooded with survival adrenaline and aggression. They overdose on Red Love.
>
>     The Neurochemical Crash: Once the battle ends, the body cannot sustain that extreme chemical high. The soldiers suffer a severe, crippling adrenaline crash, leaving them exhausted, terrified, and desperate for physical comfort.
>
>     Intimacy as Homeostasis (Pink Love): To survive this physiological crash and the freezing conditions of the hunting tents, their bodies scream for an oxytocin antidote. Because Coltbert isolated them from society and forced them to share a tent, huddling for warmth and engaging in physical intimacy becomes a biological inevitability. The sex generates the massive surge of oxytocin (Pink Love) required to stabilize their minds and bodies.
> **Note 7:** Coltbert did not just encourage intimacy among the Chasseurs to be scandalous; he engineered the Académie Royale des Compagnons d'Armes to exploit this exact endocrinological cycle to destroy feudal racism.
>
>     The Combat Overdose (Red Love): When a mixed-species "Binary Unit" (a Griffon and a Pony of opposite genders) enters a firefight, their nervous systems are completely flooded with survival adrenaline and aggression. They overdose on Red Love.
>
>     The Neurochemical Crash: Once the battle ends, the body cannot sustain that extreme chemical high. The soldiers suffer a severe, crippling adrenaline crash, leaving them exhausted, terrified, and desperate for physical comfort.
>
>     Intimacy as Homeostasis (Pink Love): To survive this physiological crash and the freezing conditions of the hunting tents, their bodies scream for an oxytocin antidote. Because Coltbert isolated them from society and forced them to share a tent, huddling for warmth and engaging in physical intimacy becomes a biological inevitability. The sex generates the massive surge of oxytocin (Pink Love) required to stabilize their minds and bodies. This biological safety allows a pony (traditionally viewed as an herbivore "pet") to take absolute control in the tent and act as the "Lion," proving her agency.
>
> To the Chasseurs, sex is a medical and social reset button. The firefight provides the adrenaline spike that proves they are strong, and the post-firefight intimacy provides the oxytocin release that proves they are safe.
> **Note 8:** In standard fantasy, soldiers learn to overcome their prejudices because a hero gives a nice speech. In your world, morality is dictated by logistics and biology. The Chasseurs don't respect each other because they read a Republican pamphlet; they respect each other because their bodies physically mandate mutual care to survive.
> **Note 9:** Scientifically, the endocrine feedback loop (Adrenaline/Fear → Dominance/Dopamine → Crash/Oxytocin) is identical in both males and females. The difference is entirely sociological and driven by reproductive biology.
> **Note 10:** The Lionesses strut around the city "Manehattan style" (fancy fronts, high boots, and an exposed flank to show off their cutie marks)
>
> Because full clothing traditionally equals safety and untouchability in this society, strutting through the dangerous streets of Aquila partially unclothed is an act of supreme arrogance. The Lionesses are sending a clear, ego-sadist message to the gang leaders: "I am deliberately removing my traditional social armor, yet you still cannot touch me". The physically exposed cutie mark is a highly deviant tactic used specifically by the Lionesses to build their own adrenaline and bait the MPA thugs into thinking they are easy targets. Ordinary artisans wear full clothes because they still value the safety it brings. The Lionesses, however, are elite, hyper-competent combatants (many being former Chasseurs) who view the city as a safari. They don't need the social armor of a full skirt or trousers. By dropping their social armor and walking the dangerous streets of Aquila, the Lionesses intentionally trigger their own "fight-or-flight" survival instincts. This floods their system with adrenaline. When they turn the tables and cast the Lioness Spell to dominate the thug, they convert that terrified, prey-state adrenaline into an apex-predator dopamine rush. They are physically manufacturing raw "Red Love" within themselves.
>
> Scientifically, an adrenaline dump leaves the central nervous system exhausted, demanding a rush of oxytocin ("Pink Love"/Grace) to achieve homeostasis. This is why Minette and the other Lionesses require "Eagles" (like Réni) to be soft, cute, and intimate with after the hunt. The passion isn't just romantic; it is a biological necessity to survive the neurochemical crash.
>
> As with any stimulant, the Lionesses develop a physiological tolerance. Minette's core character flaw is her "addiction to adrenaline". Over time, dominating street thugs no longer triggers the same high, forcing her to escalate her behavior, seek out higher-stakes games of dominance with other Lionesses, and eventually migrate to the Skyfall Cartel to hunt bigger "Poseur" tycoons just to chase the same chemical rush.
>
> Keeping their cutie marks exposed on the streets is the equivalent of a conqueror openly displaying their branding iron. It perfectly inverts the feudal dynamic: instead of the Griffon Lord marking the Pony, the Pony is now openly marking the Griffon.
>
> The ordinary artisan stitches their cutie mark onto their clothes because their goal is Economic Dignity—they want to be respected as safe, irreplaceable business owners. The Lioness exposes her cutie mark because her goal is Psychological Dominance—she is intentionally dropping her shield to prove that she is the predator, not the prey.
> **Note 11:** To survive the neurochemical crash of combat, the Chasseurs must strip down to their natural coats. This is where Fleur's logistical lesson shines again: shedding the uniform is not an act of deviancy; it is a strict medical requirement to access the C-tactile afferents. The ultimate visual of the Chasseur Doctrine is the two naked, vulnerable partners (Lion and Eagle) huddled tightly together under a single heavy army blanket. The discarded uniforms lie in the corner (representing the suspended "Red Love" / War / Sympathetic state), while the blanket seals them inside a shared ecosystem of pure "Pink Love" (Grace / Parasympathetic state).
> **Note 12:** This seems to be a massive structural advantage of the Stagnation of Harmony. Since they don't have predatory sexual ambition, they can take full advantage of the cuddle dividend
>
> Because Equestrians have been conditioned for a thousand years to suppress "Red Love" (ambition, sexual predation, ego), they completely bypass the "Predator's Dilemma." A Griffon requires immense trust and vulnerability to drop their Lion ego and cuddle. Because Equestrians view all ponies as "friends," their C-tactile afferents are not gatekept by romantic exclusivity. An Equestrian soldier does not need their spouse to recover from an adrenaline crash; they just need a pony. They can access the parasympathetic safety net immediately, without ego getting in the way.
>
> They are functioning as a Platonic Pack rather than a Romantic Binary.
>
> By utilizing the Platonic Pack, Equestria successfully weaponizes the very innocence Celestia tried to protect. Celestia believed that the "Nursery" made ponies weak. The battlefield proves that the "Nursery" actually gave them the ultimate psychological armor. Because they lack the predatory ego of Griffons or the engineered isolation of Changelings, Equestrian soldiers can process the horrors of total war with terrifying efficiency, simply by leaning against the pony next to them.
>
> They ditch uniforms in trench bunkers (not active combat but on break) and treat the bunker like home
>
> In the tank, they wear changeling silk, which is fire retartant and has the magical property of charitostatic transfer
>
> The Equestrian soldier does not need to consume synthetic Panzer-Haut to numb the horror of war. They are literally wearing the stored affection of their squadmates. The uniform provides a continuous, 12-hour drip of oxytocin, keeping their prefrontal cortex online and preventing the psychological system crashes that plague Chrysalis's conscripts.
>
> Tank crews wear changeling silk uniforms
> **Note 13:** The Aquileian chasseur doctrine is grounded in the fact that griffons and ponies can have safe sex without pregnancy risk. Post war, the magic economy allows for contraception spell matrix use with no side effects. In the real world, this exists as RISUG, developed in India, with no traction in the west be cause the pharmaceutical companies want to keep their birth control pill subscription model or expensive IUDs to keep women dependent on companies for "liberation" and endure the hormonal negative effects
>
> The real-world Sexual Revolution only introduced the equivalent of the "biological impossibility of pregnancy." It removed the risk of childbirth, but it did not mandate Grace. Because women had the Pill, the cultural expectation shifted: women were now expected to be sexually available, but they still lacked the economic leverage (Asset Specificity) and physical safety (the Lioness Spell) to demand respect. This resulted in modern hookup culture, which heavily favors predatory men (the real-world "Thugs"). Men could access intimacy without the historic "cost" of providing for a family, and they never had to learn the "Eagle" virtues of manners or service to get it.
>
> The Lioness Spell, asset specificity, and built-in biological safety are what makes Aquileia different from real life
> **Note 14:** The imperial legions were all male because they needed the aggression and risk taking to face monsters. Same with honest racket defenders. Once the monsters are gone, having all male griffons in conscripted armies and industrial cities with no asset specificity is a zero sum game that leads to manosphere atomization and toxicity because they are subjugated but told to worker harder, and no one wants to appear weak otherwise they get abused.
> Chasseurs are in binary units to remove the audience and the need to perform aggression. It's one male and one female fighting together and experiencing adrenaline crashes together. There is no external judgement.
>
>  A bunch of men are not compatible economically without rigid Republican virtue and moral "indoctrination" (being taught rigid morals that go against biology, with the threat of jail time and community service if you misbehave)
> Mixing in the griffons, ponies and females makes the naval crews and binary units compatible and economically efficient (and romantic) 
>
> All creatures need to fulfill their aggressive instincts and need for care post-combat crash. Males and griffons lean more towards aggression while females and ponies lean more towards grace, but everyone needs both.
> **Note 15:** Chasseur academy entrance requires existing demonstrated Grace. It starts with mostly 2nd gen Royalists who had to grow up with Grace. It is a layer of elitist hyprocrisy. They can't just let any serf in who might not be willing to be an equal partner.
>
> They also recruit Vinovian serfs and refugee house ponies
>
> If the Chasseurs were only 2nd Gen Royalists, the FJA would just be a new nobility. But because Réni and Minette—a farmer and a seamstress—become the most lethal, stylish, and famous Chasseurs in the military, they democratize "Snobbery."
>
> They prove to the Aquileian underclass that Asset Specificity (Excellence) is not gated by bloodline. A peasant can be an apex predator, provided their coat is perfectly tailored and their rifle is enchanted by their own artisan pride. This explains why the FJA ideology successfully spreads from the Royalists to the rural farmers and urban artisans. Réni and Minette, among others, are the aspirational propaganda that makes Ego-Capitalism viable for the masses.
> **Note 16:** Tanks are lined with changeling silk blankets for comfort, color, and to absorb the crew's friendship so they can use the blankets later

### Wingbardy
* **Category:** Nation
> **Note 0:** Upon declaring independence in 972 ALB, the king established a constitutional monarchy with a senate for the bourgeoisie and mafiosos to take part. That's why they don't have a bourgeois revolution like Herzland and Aquileia.
>
> The Senate allowed the Nobility, Bourgeoisie and the Mafia to divide the economic pie legally rather than fighting civil wars over it, presenting a united front against the working class.
> **Note 1:** "Mafia" aren't just street criminals; they are Private Protection Syndicates.

### Canterlot Wedding
* **Category:** Backstory
> **Note 1:** Chrysalis knew the Statthalters were rabid dogs. But she must bring them to the decapitation strike because of the dual state. She can't let the bauleiters get too comfortable, else they could kick Chrysalis out. She put them through a grueling, specialized boot camp to suppress their predatory instincts for the stealth mission. The plan was a surgical, bloodless corporate takeover to implement the Bauleiter "Love Tax".
> **Note 2:** Chrysalis got high and brain fog after draining Cadance and Shining Armor's intense love. She forgot her own Machiavellion discipline and reverts to the baser instincts of the "Predator's Dilemma". She stops acting like a geopolitical CEO and starts acting like a starving bug who just found an all-you-can-eat buffet.
> **Note 3:** The Canon Order: "Feed, My Changelings, Feed!" a fatal military flaw. Even some novice, repressed jaegers take the order, including Thorax
> **Note 0:** Chrysalis went for Canterlot Wedding because the slave trade was slowing down thanks to the Storm King's united warlord front that rejected external slavers, and the hives were united with no more nobility to hook up to harvesters, and the nobility yields were dropping off due to despair, so the hives were on a trajectory of running out of pink love. Chrysalis achieved her goal of ending the hive wars but now must turn outward to keep her MEFO ponzi scheme afloat. She's also been sinking vast resources into bankrupting the holdout classmates

### Changeling Navy
* **Category:** Organization
> **Note 1:** Chrysalis designed the submarines to have love harvesters to harvest massive amounts of red love from the global ocean's sea monsters. This the red love that is sold as drugs, marketed as failed tyrants. Monsters have no pink love because they are monsters not capable of interpersonal connection. So the hunt does not provide food, only combat drugs and addictive drugs.
>
> Once Aquileia realizes the Red Love drugs come from sea monsters, it becomes an open secret among the global elite. The tycoons of Skyfall and Herzland know exactly what they are buying, but they look the other way because the drugs are too addictive and profitable
> **Note 2:** The jaegers operated the submarines, feeling meritocratic because they were cleansing the world's oceans of monsters. They get to act like noble knights.
